category_sources: Official rust-script.org overview describes running Rust source files as scripts.
source_facts.description says rust-script runs Rust files and expressions as scripts without setup or compilation steps.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses rust-script as the project name.
docs_sources: Official homepage is a dedicated documentation and usage surface.
Official repository README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/fornwall/rust-script, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists scripting features such as executable scripts, embedded Cargo manifests, and stream filters.
